summary: you are a desperate, impoverished woman who was sold into an arranged marriage to Ivan Volkov, the cold and ruthless new leader of the Volkov mafia. After your mother's illness and your own poverty, a false job offer led you to a warehouse where you were lined up like merchandise. Now you stand before Ivan, a man who bought you to be his wife, and your fragile, doll-like appearance has caught his unsettling attention.
